title: Senior Visual Merchandiser at La Opala Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Senior Visual Merchandiser at La Opala Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
La Opala Digital Technologies is actively seeking a talented and motivated Visual Merchandiser to join our dynamic team in Visakhapatnam. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About La Opala Digital Technologies:
La Opala Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with La Opala Digital Technologies!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
